name: IRCTC SBI Platinum Card

rewards.displayCategory: Eligible AC rail ticket bookings on IRCTC

domestic: 4 complimentary railway lounge visits per year in India, capped at 1 per quarter, for the primary cardholder.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 350 activation bonus Reward Points on a single transaction of Rs 500 or more within 60 days of card issuance

renewalBenefitsValued.label: 500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee

joiningBenefits: 350 activation bonus Reward Points on a single transaction of Rs 500 or more within 60 days of card issuance
renewalBenefits: 500 Reward Points on payment of renewal fee
additionalBenefits: Save 1% transaction charges on eligible railway ticket bookings on IRCTC
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped at Rs 100 per statement cycle

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location

internalNotes: Audited against official IRCTC SBI Platinum product page and IRCTC offer page on 2026-06-08.
The 10% value-back framing comes from 10 Reward Points per Rs 125 on eligible AC1, AC2, AC3, Executive Chair Car, and Chair Car bookings via IRCTC app or website.
Reward Points accrued in the SBI Card account will not get credited to the IRCTC loyalty account if the loyalty account status is blocked, inactive, or suspended.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-09.
